full_text:
Dong Yuan
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Dong Yuan. Tasked with defending Jiaozhi but poor leadership and the cleverness of Tao Huang saw him defeated. Dong Yuan was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty.
